theme: Foundation milestone of the v1.10b 'fit-up' backfill. Intended as a heavy 're-sync the ~5-week-stale clones to current prod + recapture the snapshot + re-validate the M201 false-negatives'. KEY FINDING: the clones were NOT stale — M47 measured them current (next-web @ v2.89.0, every repo <=2 behind; the member-AI-readiness feature present in app v1.315), so the re-sync was a trivial `make pull` and the flagged big-unknown risk evaporated. The genuine stale surface is the rosetta corpus (AI-readiness undocumented) -> M48. Code deliverable: pg.NormalizeDSN (sslmode no-verify->require, applied at the Connect choke point) so the wired `postgres` MCP DSN works as a primary-read capture `--dsn` (demo-up #2) — proven end-to-end by a live dry-run + the full recapture. source.go/cmd/stacksnap already supported --dsn->primary-read (no change, D2). The up-injected.sh auto-capture wiring was DESCOPED per user (no new entry point, D3): capture stays the existing operator/agent step, now turnkey. All 3 snapshot surfaces recaptured from current prod; all schema digests UNCHANGED (clean in-place refresh). Tooling + docs only — ZERO platform-repo edits.
scope_status: all sections S1-S6 Done (Fate 1). One conscious scope revision (D3, up-injected.sh auto-capture descoped per user — capability still delivered). Zero escape-hatch deferrals.
code_location: ext (code-of-record, SEPARATE repo, the tag IS the record): rosetta-extensions @ tag fit-up-m47 (HEAD f30194c). rosetta: m47/resync-recapture merged --no-ff into release/01.10b-fit-up at close (the corpus doc-half: snapshot-cold-start.md update + the milestone planning archive + the design + premise corrections).
code_diff: ext: stack-snapshot ONLY — pg/pg.go (+NormalizeDSN + normalizeURLSSLMode + normalizeKeywordSSLMode, applied at Connect) + pg/pg_test.go (+TestNormalizeDSN, 9 table cases incl. 2 adversarial). NO go.mod/go.sum change (0 new deps). rosetta: corpus/ops/snapshot-cold-start.md (the M47 MCP-configured-DSN section + Option 2b) + the plan files (overview/progress/decisions/spec-notes/metrics/retro + roadmap/state/roadmap-vision/context premise corrections) + the v1.8 archive-move chore (on main).
